_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: A dramatic effect was seen when combination therapy was tested in this model. Not only did the combination significantly outperform either of the single agents, but we also observed long-term survivors at the conclusion of the study. Some animals had no detectable tumors at the conclusion of the study, suggesting a durable response.
details: In S462-TY xenograft model, digoxin + selumetinib combination showed dramatic survival increase with long-term survivors and some animals having no detectable tumors at study conclusion, while rigosertib + selumetinib also showed dramatic improvement with long-term survivors
